items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-76 eastbound between .2 miles west of Exit 341: MONTGOMERY DR/WEST RIVER DRIVE and .5 miles east of Exit 341: MONTGOMERY DR/WEST RIVER DRIVE. There is a lane restriction.
